prose: Fukui reactivity indices were computed for nitrobenzene (14 atoms: O O N C C C C C C H H H H H) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (PySCF, tier 'standard', density-fit RI) in the gas phase, charge 0/multiplicity 1 (neutral), with N±1 states at charge ±1/multiplicity 2. Partial charges were computed via Mulliken (PySCF). Geometry was taken directly from the user-supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization). All three SCFs converged. Integrity: trustworthy=true; sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000. No warnings reported. The headline value reported is the maximum f+ (most electrophilic site): atom 4 (C, ipso carbon bearing –NO2), f+ = 0.49641782. Most nucleophilic site: atom 5 (C, ortho), f- = 0.10728820. Live log: fukui_20260702-202222.out. Plot: agent_call_02_plot.png.
